---
title: "MacroAss2"
output: html_document
date: "2025-04-30"
---

```{r}
rm(list=ls())    

```



```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(rugarch)
setwd("~/Downloads")
data <- read_csv("L3harris (1).csv")
head(data)
data$Close <- as.numeric(gsub("[$]", "", data$`Close/Last`))
data$Date <- as.Date(data$Date, format = "%m/%d/%Y")
Returns <- diff(log(data$Close))
returns <- na.omit(Returns)
head(returns)
# Position size and confidence levels
position_value <- 10000000
conf_levels <- c(0.90, 0.95, 0.99)
conf_labels <- c("90", "95", "99")
```

```{r}
# ===== Historical Parametric VaR (Normal distribution) =====
# Based on historical mean and standard deviation

mu_hist <- mean(returns)
sigma_hist <- sd(returns)

VaR_1d_hist <- c()
VaR_5d_hist <- c()

for (conf in conf_levels) {
  z <- qnorm(conf)
  var_1d <- abs(position_value * (mu_hist + z * sigma_hist))
  var_5d <- abs(position_value * (5 * mu_hist + z * sigma_hist * sqrt(5)))
  VaR_1d_hist <- c(VaR_1d_hist, var_1d)
  VaR_5d_hist <- c(VaR_5d_hist, var_5d)
}


VaR_matrix <- rbind(
  Historical = c(VaR_1d_hist, VaR_5d_hist),
  GARCH_11 = c(VaR_1d, VaR_5d),
  AR_GARCH_11 = c(VaR_1d_ar, VaR_5d_ar),
  AR_GARCH_11_t = c(VaR_1d_t, VaR_5d_t),
  AR_EGARCH_11_t = c(VaR_1d_egarch, VaR_5d_egarch)
)

colnames(VaR_matrix) <- as.vector(outer(conf_labels, c("1d", "5d"), paste, sep = "_"))
VaR_df <- as.data.frame(round(VaR_matrix, 2))

cat("\n========== All VaR Results (EUR) ==========\n")
print(VaR_df)

```


```{r}
# Specify GARCH(1,1) model with constant mean and normal distribution
spec_garch <- ugarchspec(
  mean.model = list(armaOrder = c(0, 0), include.mean = TRUE),
  variance.model = list(model = "sGARCH", garchOrder = c(1, 1)),
  distribution.model = "norm"
)

# Fit model
fit_garch <- ugarchfit(spec_garch, returns)

# Forecast next 5 days
forecast <- ugarchforecast(fit_garch, n.ahead = 5)
sigma_forecast <- sigma(forecast)
sigma_1d <- sigma_forecast[1]
sigma_5d <- sqrt(sum(sigma_forecast^2))  # sum of variances

# Compute VaR for each confidence level
VaR_1d <- c()
VaR_5d <- c()

for (conf in conf_levels) {
  z <- qnorm(conf)  # left-tail quantile (e.g., qnorm(0.01) = -2.33 for 99%)
  var_1d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_1d)
  var_5d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_5d)
  VaR_1d <- c(VaR_1d, var_1d)
  VaR_5d <- c(VaR_5d, var_5d)
}

# Display results
VaR_matrix <- matrix(c(VaR_1d, VaR_5d), nrow = 1)
colnames(VaR_matrix) <- as.vector(outer(conf_labels, c("1d", "5d"), paste, sep = "_"))
rownames(VaR_matrix) <- c("GARCH(1,1)")
VaR_df <- as.data.frame(round(VaR_matrix, 2))

cat("====== GARCH(1,1) VaR Results (EUR) ======\n")
print(VaR_df)

```




```{r}
# AR(1)-GARCH(1,1), Normal distribution
spec_ar_garch <- ugarchspec(
  mean.model = list(armaOrder = c(1, 0), include.mean = TRUE),
  variance.model = list(model = "sGARCH", garchOrder = c(1, 1)),
  distribution.model = "norm"
)

fit_ar_garch <- ugarchfit(spec_ar_garch, returns)
forecast_ar_garch <- ugarchforecast(fit_ar_garch, n.ahead = 5)
sigma_ar_garch <- sigma(forecast_ar_garch)
sigma_1d_ar <- sigma_ar_garch[1]
sigma_5d_ar <- sqrt(sum(sigma_ar_garch^2))

VaR_1d_ar <- c()
VaR_5d_ar <- c()

for (conf in conf_levels) {
  z <- qnorm(conf)
  var_1d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_1d_ar)
  var_5d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_5d_ar)
  VaR_1d_ar <- c(VaR_1d_ar, var_1d)
  VaR_5d_ar <- c(VaR_5d_ar, var_5d)
}

```



```{r}
# AR(1)-GARCH(1,1), Student-t distribution
spec_ar_garch_t <- ugarchspec(
  mean.model = list(armaOrder = c(1, 0), include.mean = TRUE),
  variance.model = list(model = "sGARCH", garchOrder = c(1, 1)),
  distribution.model = "std"
)

fit_ar_garch_t <- ugarchfit(spec_ar_garch_t, returns)
forecast_ar_garch_t <- ugarchforecast(fit_ar_garch_t, n.ahead = 5)
sigma_ar_garch_t <- sigma(forecast_ar_garch_t)
sigma_1d_t <- sigma_ar_garch_t[1]
sigma_5d_t <- sqrt(sum(sigma_ar_garch_t^2))
df_t <- coef(fit_ar_garch_t)["shape"]

VaR_1d_t <- c()
VaR_5d_t <- c()

for (conf in conf_levels) {
  z <- qt(conf, df = df_t)
  var_1d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_1d_t)
  var_5d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_5d_t)
  VaR_1d_t <- c(VaR_1d_t, var_1d)
  VaR_5d_t <- c(VaR_5d_t, var_5d)
}

```



```{r}
# AR(1)-EGARCH(1,1), Student-t distribution
spec_ar_egarch_t <- ugarchspec(
  mean.model = list(armaOrder = c(1, 0), include.mean = TRUE),
  variance.model = list(model = "eGARCH", garchOrder = c(1, 1)),
  distribution.model = "std"
)

fit_ar_egarch_t <- ugarchfit(spec_ar_egarch_t, returns)
forecast_ar_egarch_t <- ugarchforecast(fit_ar_egarch_t, n.ahead = 5)
sigma_ar_egarch_t <- sigma(forecast_ar_egarch_t)
sigma_1d_egarch <- sigma_ar_egarch_t[1]
sigma_5d_egarch <- sqrt(sum(sigma_ar_egarch_t^2))
df_egarch <- coef(fit_ar_egarch_t)["shape"]

VaR_1d_egarch <- c()
VaR_5d_egarch <- c()

for (conf in conf_levels) {
  z <- qt(conf, df = df_egarch)
  var_1d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_1d_egarch)
  var_5d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_5d_egarch)
  VaR_1d_egarch <- c(VaR_1d_egarch, var_1d)
  VaR_5d_egarch <- c(VaR_5d_egarch, var_5d)
}

```



```{r}
VaR_matrix <- rbind(
  GARCH_11 = c(VaR_1d, VaR_5d),
  AR_GARCH_11 = c(VaR_1d_ar, VaR_5d_ar),
  AR_GARCH_11_t = c(VaR_1d_t, VaR_5d_t),
  AR_EGARCH_11_t = c(VaR_1d_egarch, VaR_5d_egarch)
)

colnames(VaR_matrix) <- as.vector(outer(conf_labels, c("1d", "5d"), paste, sep = "_"))
VaR_df <- as.data.frame(round(VaR_matrix, 2))

cat("\n========== All VaR Results (EUR) ==========\n")
print(VaR_df)

```


```{r}
cat("\n=== Model: GARCH(1,1), Normal ===\n")
print(coef(fit_garch))

cat("\n=== Model: AR(1)-GARCH(1,1), Normal ===\n")
print(coef(fit_ar_garch))

cat("\n=== Model: AR(1)-GARCH(1,1), Student-t ===\n")
print(coef(fit_ar_garch_t))

cat("\n=== Model: AR(1)-EGARCH(1,1), Student-t ===\n")
print(coef(fit_ar_egarch_t))





```














```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(rugarch)
setwd("~/Downloads")
data <- read_csv("NorthrupGrumman.csv")
head(data)
data$Close <- as.numeric(gsub("[$]", "", data$`Close/Last`))
data$Date <- as.Date(data$Date, format = "%m/%d/%Y")
Returns <- diff(log(data$Close))
returns <- na.omit(Returns)
head(returns)
# Position size and confidence levels
position_value <- 10000000
conf_levels <- c(0.90, 0.95, 0.99)
conf_labels <- c("90", "95", "99")
```

```{r}
# ===== Historical Parametric VaR (Normal distribution) =====
# Based on historical mean and standard deviation

mu_hist <- mean(returns)
sigma_hist <- sd(returns)

VaR_1d_hist <- c()
VaR_5d_hist <- c()

for (conf in conf_levels) {
  z <- qnorm(conf)
  var_1d <- abs(position_value * (mu_hist + z * sigma_hist))
  var_5d <- abs(position_value * (5 * mu_hist + z * sigma_hist * sqrt(5)))
  VaR_1d_hist <- c(VaR_1d_hist, var_1d)
  VaR_5d_hist <- c(VaR_5d_hist, var_5d)
}


VaR_matrix <- rbind(
  Historical = c(VaR_1d_hist, VaR_5d_hist),
  GARCH_11 = c(VaR_1d, VaR_5d),
  AR_GARCH_11 = c(VaR_1d_ar, VaR_5d_ar),
  AR_GARCH_11_t = c(VaR_1d_t, VaR_5d_t),
  AR_EGARCH_11_t = c(VaR_1d_egarch, VaR_5d_egarch)
)

colnames(VaR_matrix) <- as.vector(outer(conf_labels, c("1d", "5d"), paste, sep = "_"))
VaR_df <- as.data.frame(round(VaR_matrix, 2))

cat("\n========== All VaR Results (EUR) ==========\n")
print(VaR_df)

```


```{r}
# Specify GARCH(1,1) model with constant mean and normal distribution
spec_garch <- ugarchspec(
  mean.model = list(armaOrder = c(0, 0), include.mean = TRUE),
  variance.model = list(model = "sGARCH", garchOrder = c(1, 1)),
  distribution.model = "norm"
)

# Fit model
fit_garch <- ugarchfit(spec_garch, returns)

# Forecast next 5 days
forecast <- ugarchforecast(fit_garch, n.ahead = 5)
sigma_forecast <- sigma(forecast)
sigma_1d <- sigma_forecast[1]
sigma_5d <- sqrt(sum(sigma_forecast^2))  # sum of variances

# Compute VaR for each confidence level
VaR_1d <- c()
VaR_5d <- c()

for (conf in conf_levels) {
  z <- qnorm(conf)  # left-tail quantile (e.g., qnorm(0.01) = -2.33 for 99%)
  var_1d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_1d)
  var_5d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_5d)
  VaR_1d <- c(VaR_1d, var_1d)
  VaR_5d <- c(VaR_5d, var_5d)
}

# Display results
VaR_matrix <- matrix(c(VaR_1d, VaR_5d), nrow = 1)
colnames(VaR_matrix) <- as.vector(outer(conf_labels, c("1d", "5d"), paste, sep = "_"))
rownames(VaR_matrix) <- c("GARCH(1,1)")
VaR_df <- as.data.frame(round(VaR_matrix, 2))

cat("====== GARCH(1,1) VaR Results (EUR) ======\n")
print(VaR_df)

```




```{r}
# AR(1)-GARCH(1,1), Normal distribution
spec_ar_garch <- ugarchspec(
  mean.model = list(armaOrder = c(1, 0), include.mean = TRUE),
  variance.model = list(model = "sGARCH", garchOrder = c(1, 1)),
  distribution.model = "norm"
)

fit_ar_garch <- ugarchfit(spec_ar_garch, returns)
forecast_ar_garch <- ugarchforecast(fit_ar_garch, n.ahead = 5)
sigma_ar_garch <- sigma(forecast_ar_garch)
sigma_1d_ar <- sigma_ar_garch[1]
sigma_5d_ar <- sqrt(sum(sigma_ar_garch^2))

VaR_1d_ar <- c()
VaR_5d_ar <- c()

for (conf in conf_levels) {
  z <- qnorm(conf)
  var_1d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_1d_ar)
  var_5d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_5d_ar)
  VaR_1d_ar <- c(VaR_1d_ar, var_1d)
  VaR_5d_ar <- c(VaR_5d_ar, var_5d)
}

```



```{r}
# AR(1)-GARCH(1,1), Student-t distribution
spec_ar_garch_t <- ugarchspec(
  mean.model = list(armaOrder = c(1, 0), include.mean = TRUE),
  variance.model = list(model = "sGARCH", garchOrder = c(1, 1)),
  distribution.model = "std"
)

fit_ar_garch_t <- ugarchfit(spec_ar_garch_t, returns)
forecast_ar_garch_t <- ugarchforecast(fit_ar_garch_t, n.ahead = 5)
sigma_ar_garch_t <- sigma(forecast_ar_garch_t)
sigma_1d_t <- sigma_ar_garch_t[1]
sigma_5d_t <- sqrt(sum(sigma_ar_garch_t^2))
df_t <- coef(fit_ar_garch_t)["shape"]

VaR_1d_t <- c()
VaR_5d_t <- c()

for (conf in conf_levels) {
  z <- qt(conf, df = df_t)
  var_1d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_1d_t)
  var_5d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_5d_t)
  VaR_1d_t <- c(VaR_1d_t, var_1d)
  VaR_5d_t <- c(VaR_5d_t, var_5d)
}

```



```{r}
# AR(1)-EGARCH(1,1), Student-t distribution
spec_ar_egarch_t <- ugarchspec(
  mean.model = list(armaOrder = c(1, 0), include.mean = TRUE),
  variance.model = list(model = "eGARCH", garchOrder = c(1, 1)),
  distribution.model = "std"
)

fit_ar_egarch_t <- ugarchfit(spec_ar_egarch_t, returns)
forecast_ar_egarch_t <- ugarchforecast(fit_ar_egarch_t, n.ahead = 5)
sigma_ar_egarch_t <- sigma(forecast_ar_egarch_t)
sigma_1d_egarch <- sigma_ar_egarch_t[1]
sigma_5d_egarch <- sqrt(sum(sigma_ar_egarch_t^2))
df_egarch <- coef(fit_ar_egarch_t)["shape"]

VaR_1d_egarch <- c()
VaR_5d_egarch <- c()

for (conf in conf_levels) {
  z <- qt(conf, df = df_egarch)
  var_1d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_1d_egarch)
  var_5d <- abs(position_value * z * sigma_5d_egarch)
  VaR_1d_egarch <- c(VaR_1d_egarch, var_1d)
  VaR_5d_egarch <- c(VaR_5d_egarch, var_5d)
}

```



```{r}
VaR_matrix <- rbind(
  GARCH_11 = c(VaR_1d, VaR_5d),
  AR_GARCH_11 = c(VaR_1d_ar, VaR_5d_ar),
  AR_GARCH_11_t = c(VaR_1d_t, VaR_5d_t),
  AR_EGARCH_11_t = c(VaR_1d_egarch, VaR_5d_egarch)
)

colnames(VaR_matrix) <- as.vector(outer(conf_labels, c("1d", "5d"), paste, sep = "_"))
VaR_df <- as.data.frame(round(VaR_matrix, 2))

cat("\n========== All VaR Results (EUR) ==========\n")
print(VaR_df)

```


```{r}
cat("\n=== Model: GARCH(1,1), Normal ===\n")
print(coef(fit_garch))

cat("\n=== Model: AR(1)-GARCH(1,1), Normal ===\n")
print(coef(fit_ar_garch))

cat("\n=== Model: AR(1)-GARCH(1,1), Student-t ===\n")
print(coef(fit_ar_garch_t))

cat("\n=== Model: AR(1)-EGARCH(1,1), Student-t ===\n")
print(coef(fit_ar_egarch_t))





```
